markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Interview Viviane Ramos for the Engagement Manager role at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Role:** Engagement Manager (Account Manager + Strategist) for the 8-week "Sprint" program, which serves as a sales vehicle to convert new clients to annual contracts.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [**Candidate Fit:** Strong candidate with deep SEO expertise and a proven ability to manage complex projects (e.g., de-indexing hundreds of thousands of pages on a healthcare site).](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [**AI Experience:** A "native user" of ChatGPT for \~2 years, using it for everything from daily tasks to generating schema code.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [**GrowthX Context:** A fast-paced, meritocratic environment with an 8-week client waitlist, where the main challenge is managing a high volume of clients (6–10) simultaneously.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)

## Topics

### The GrowthX "Sprint" Program

  - [**Purpose:** An 8-week paid pilot to showcase GrowthX's capabilities and convert new clients to annual contracts.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
      - [**Weeks 1–4:** Build an AI content pipeline; publish \~3 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
      - [**Weeks 5–8:** Ramp up production to 5 articles/week.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
      - [**Total Output:** \~20 editorial blog posts.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=346.0)
  - [**Key Deliverables:**](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=48.0)
      - [Build an AI content pipeline ("agentic system").](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [Develop a content and SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
      - [Drive early traffic and results to prove value.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=81.0)

### Engagement Manager Role

  - [**Core Function:** A strategic account manager and the primary client contact.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [**Responsibilities:**](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
      - [Own the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
      - [Interface with internal teams: Managing Editors (pipeline) and Engineering (pipeline tweaks).](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [**Client Cadence:** 1 weekly meeting (8 total) per client.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)

### Viviane's Experience & Approach

  - [**Project Management:** Uses ClickUp (previously Notion) for organization.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [**Handling Complex Projects:**](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [**Example:** Led a content consolidation project for a million-page healthcare site.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
      - [**Action:** De-indexed hundreds of thousands of underperforming pages after a performance analysis.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
      - [**Outcome:** Successfully pivoted strategy to drive leads from service pages, earning praise from the client and leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [**Stakeholder Management:**](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
      - [**Method:** Uses shared channels for visibility; avoids DMs.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=754.0)
      - [**Escalation:** Follows up 3 times, then escalates to manager.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
      - [**Client Deadlines:** Sets a buffer by giving clients a later deadline than the internal team's.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Account Management Style:**](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1393.0)
      - [Builds strong relationships with clients and colleagues.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
      - [Accountable and energized by sharing results.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1457.0)
      - [Diverse background (customer success, translation) informs a people-centric approach.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1495.0)

### AI & SEO Expertise

  - [**AI Usage:**](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - ["Native user" of ChatGPT for \~2 years, using it for tasks from daily work to generating schema code.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Has taken a prompt engineering course.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=922.0)
      - [Has not adopted other tools (e.g., Claude, Perplexity) for regular use.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [**SEO vs. AEO:**](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
      - [**SEO:** Highly confident in ranking content and proving results.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
      - [**AEO (AI Search):** Actively experimenting but frustrated by unreliable tracking tools.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1203.0)
          - **Example:** Cannot attribute qualified leads from a \#1 ranking "best list" article to specific AI prompts, making performance difficult to prove with hard numbers.

### GrowthX Culture & Challenges

  - [**Challenges:**](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1573.0)
      - [**Pace:** The 8-week sprint is highly compressed, requiring rapid ramp-up and results.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
      - [**Volume:** Managing 6–10 clients simultaneously can be overwhelming.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
      - [**Tech Stack:** The internal environment is highly advanced, with widespread use of LLMs and automation tools (e.g., n8n, Make).](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1663.0)
  - [**Culture & Strengths:**](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
      - [**Meritocracy:** Rapid advancement for high performers (e.g., William was promoted to MD in \~1 month).](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1727.0)
      - [**Product:** High-demand product with an 8-week client waitlist.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)
      - [**Ethos:** Balances speed with quality, using AI for efficiency and humans for review.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**William Leborgne:** Follow up with Viviane Ramos regarding the next steps in the hiring process.](https://fathom.video/share/DrxoUc3sW49LPeWzGzQP7NEceee4Krvs?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
